# Maintenance Fees — Advanced Topics

## PR and MR: Pool Reward vs Miner Reward

**PR (Pool Reward)** — BTC generated by the mining pool per 1 TH per day. This is the gross reward before any deductions.

**MR (Miner Reward)** — BTC actually credited to the miner holder per 1 TH per day, after fees and discounts.

### Formula

```
MR = PR − [(C1 + C2) × (1 − Σd)]
```

| Variable | Meaning |
|----------|---------|
| PR | Pool reward per TH per day |
| MR | Miner reward per TH per day (what you receive) |
| C1 | Electricity costs per TH per day (USD, deducted in BTC or GMT) |
| C2 | Maintenance and infrastructure costs per TH per day |
| Σd | Total discount on C1 and C2 |

C1 and C2 are fixed in USD but deducted in cryptocurrency based on the exchange rate at the time of deduction. If total fees exceed pool reward on a given day, MR = 0.

---

## Can I Pay for Maintenance in Tokens for Only Some Miners?

No. Token payment can only be enabled **for all miners at once**. It cannot be set individually per miner.

---

## Payment Priority

1. GOMINING tokens are deducted first.
2. If token balance is insufficient, the remaining amount is deducted from **BTC rewards**.
3. This fallback ensures uninterrupted service but reduces BTC earnings.

---

## Bonus Miners

Maintenance fees for **Bonus Miners** are always charged in **Bitcoin** and cannot be paid with GOMINING tokens.

---

## "Insufficient Tokens" or "Insufficient Funds" Message

This message appears when your GOMINING token balance falls below the threshold needed for maintenance fees or the 20% discount eligibility. The message persists until your balance reaches the required level.

Promotional banners about increased discounts may appear alongside this message — they are informational notices, not errors.

---

## What Happens if Reward Is Lower Than Maintenance Cost?

If **Reward Protection** is enabled and maintenance cost exceeds the reward amount for a given day, you will not be charged any maintenance fee. The miner will be marked as inactive, and both reward and maintenance display as 0.
